name: polars-bio
tagline: Reference skill for polars-bio: fast genomic interval ops and BED/VCF/BAM/GFF I/O on Polars DataFrames.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped documentation skill. No credential reads, no unsolicited network calls, no shell-piped remote code, no hidden instructions. Install is pinned (polars-bio==0.31.0) to a real, named PyPI package. Cloud I/O only touches user-specified s3/gs/az paths via standard SDK env vars, never sent elsewhere. Minor gaps: no explicit 'do not use when' gui

highlights.summary: allowed-tools declares Read Write Edit Bash (line 5); Bash is justified by `uv pip install` but the doc shows no other Bash usage, making the grant broader than demonstrated need.
No explicit 'do not use when' / negative-trigger guidance anywhere in the document.
